description: Per-category fail-on-increase baseline for ADS audit. Ratchet direction: down_only (except tokens which is noisy but free). Updated Phase 12.
ratchet_rules: typography.baseline can only decrease or stay same
spacing.baseline can only decrease or stay same
tokens.baseline can increase or decrease (audit noise)
Increases in typography/spacing/fontImports require Vikram approval + issue CAT-ADS-XXXXX

categories_explained.tokens: ADS token usage (noisy: over-reports var()/token() fallbacks, but ratchet is increase-only so inert)
categories_explained.typography: Hard-coded font-size, font-weight, line-height violations (must use ADS token scale)
categories_explained.spacing: Off-grid spacing violations (not 4/8/16/24/32/40/48px, must align to 8px grid)
categories_explained.fontImports: Custom font imports outside ADS token system (must use canonical fonts only)

phases_completed.name: Icons
phases_completed.result: Registry 25 items, SVG fixed 28, CatalystIconWrapper created ✅
